name: Welbe, Inc.
summary: Welbe, Inc. provides disability welfare services in Japan. The company offers employment-transition support services, including job training and hunting, and post-employment support for people with disabilities; and habilitation services, such as support the growth and development of children with disabilities. It operates 74 employment-transition support offices; 65 employment retention support offices; 3 specific consultation support offices; 3 employment support centers for people with developmental disabilities operated on consignment from Saitama Prefecture; 1 self-reliance training center; 36 child development support centers; 17 after-school day care service classrooms; 1 support for visiting nursery schools; 1 early childhood/learning classroom; and 1 specific consultation support office. Welbe, Inc. was founded in 2011 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
